summary: Iteration 9 - All features VERIFIED WORKING. Mind map link creation via drag (onConnect), three dots always visible on all pages, MultiSelect filters on ALL pages, custom content type creation, item linking via dialog without closing, delete via three dots without navigation.
passed_tests: MINDMAP LINK CREATION VIA DRAG: Dragged from one node's bottom handle to another node's top handle - toast 'Lien créé' appeared, edge created (0 -> 1 edges)
MINDMAP PAGE LOADS CORRECTLY: 5 nodes displayed in circular layout with type labels and colors, handles visible at top/bottom
THREE DOTS MENU VISIBLE - Inventory: Both cards show ⋮ button always visible (no opacity-0)
THREE DOTS MENU VISIBLE - Collections: Both cards show ⋮ button always visible
THREE DOTS MENU VISIBLE - Content: Three dots visible on cards
THREE DOTS MENU VISIBLE - Dropdown shows Modifier and Supprimer options
DELETE VIA THREE DOTS - Inventory: Created TEST_DeleteMe, clicked ⋮ -> Supprimer, item deleted with toast, stayed on inventory page
MULTISELECT - Inventory: Collections filter (checkboxes), Tags filter (checkboxes)
MULTISELECT - Wishlist: Priority, Tags, Collections filters all present
MULTISELECT - Content: Types filter, Tags filter present
MULTISELECT - Projects: Tags filter present with search bar
MULTISELECT - Tags: Sources filter with 6 checkboxes (Inventaire, Souhaits, Contenu, Portefeuille, Projets, Taches)
ITEM LINK VIA DIALOG: Opened inventory item, clicked 'Lier', searched 'TEST', found 5 results, dialog stayed open after clicking
CUSTOM CONTENT TYPE: Input field present, + button works, toast 'Type testpodcast sélectionné' confirms selection
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_DeleteMe item for testing delete functionality, then deleted it. Created mind map link between Collection A and Collection B via drag.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 9 features verified working: 1) MindmapPage.js has onConnect handler that calls linksApi.create() when dragging from source handle to target handle - creates link and shows toast. 2) Three dots (MoreVertical) buttons are always visible on all card pages (no opacity-0 class). 3) MultiSelect component with Popover+Checkboxes on all pages. 4) Custom content type creation via input+button in ContentPage dialog. 5) ItemLinksManager buttons have type='button' to prevent form submission. 6) Delete via dropdown uses onSelect (not onClick) and doesn't navigate away.

mindmap_link_creation_via_drag.test: Drag from node bottom handle to another node top handle
mindmap_link_creation_via_drag.result: SUCCESS - Toast 'Lien créé', edge count 0->1, connection visible in UI
mindmap_link_creation_via_drag.code_reference: MindmapPage.js lines 97-114: handleConnect callback calls linksApi.create()

mindmap_page_loads.layout: Circular with type labels (Collection, Inventaire, Souhait) and colors

delete_via_three_dots.test: Created TEST_DeleteMe, clicked three dots, clicked Supprimer
delete_via_three_dots.result: SUCCESS - Item deleted, toast shown, stayed on same page

multiselect_filters.inventory_collections: SUCCESS - Popover with checkboxes for Collection A, B
multiselect_filters.tags_sources: SUCCESS - 6 checkboxes for all source types

item_link_via_dialog.test: Open inventory item, click Lier, search TEST, click result
item_link_via_dialog.result: SUCCESS - Dialog stays open, link created

custom_content_type.test: Open content dialog, type 'TestPodcast' in custom type input, click +
